welcome.hero_subtitle: Double your sales and customer engagement through instant, smart automated replies to comments and messages, using fully certified and secure solutions.
welcome.hero.widget.autoreply.title: Auto-Reply
welcome.hero.widget.dm.title: Private Message DM
welcome.hero.widget.engagement.title: Engagement Rate
welcome.hero.widget.security.title: Security & Reliability
welcome.features_title: Everything you need to automate engagement
welcome.features_subtitle: Advanced tools designed to help you grow your business and reply to your customers in milliseconds.
welcome.feature.comments.title: Comment Auto-Replies
welcome.feature.comments.desc: Set up instant reply rules for comments on your posts to increase engagement and conversion rates.
welcome.feature.dms.title: Send Auto Private DMs
welcome.feature.dms.desc: Send product details or pricing instantly via private message as soon as a customer comments.
welcome.feature.stories.title: Story & Mentions Automation
welcome.feature.stories.desc: Reply automatically to everyone who interacts with your stories or mentions your account to increase loyalty.
welcome.feature.rules.title: Smart Keyword Engine
welcome.feature.rules.desc: Flexible rules based on keywords (Exact match, Contains, or advanced Regex) to guide replies precisely.
welcome.feature.analytics.title: Advanced Reports & Logs
welcome.feature.analytics.desc: Track automation performance, success rates, and the number of sent replies and messages in real-time.
welcome.feature.secure.title: 100% Secure & Official
welcome.feature.secure.desc: Connect officially via Facebook Login for Business to ensure the safety and stability of your accounts.
welcome.demo_subtitle: Type a mock comment in the box below to see how our smart bot instantly replies to you in under a second.
welcome.demo.bot_comment: Welcome! We have sent all the details and product price to your private messages 🌸
welcome.demo.bot_dm: Hello! The product price is 150 SAR with free shipping to all regions. To order, please provide us with your name and phone number.
welcome.how_subtitle: Three simple steps to start automating your accounts and growing your sales 24/7.
welcome.how.step1.title: 1. Connect Accounts in One Click
welcome.how.step1.desc: Log in with your official Facebook Business Account and securely link your pages and Instagram accounts.
welcome.how.step2.title: 2. Create Smart Reply Rules
welcome.how.step2.desc: Define keywords (e.g., price, details, interested) and set their corresponding public comments or private DMs.
welcome.how.step3.title: 3. We Handle the Rest!
welcome.how.step3.desc: Bariq runs reliably in the background, replying to all customers immediately even while you sleep.
welcome.pricing_title: Flexible plans for any business size
welcome.pricing_subtitle: Choose the right plan and start today. Upgrade or change your plan at any time.
welcome.pricing.starter_features: 1 channel (FB or IG), unlimited comment replies, basic rules engine.
welcome.pricing.growth_features: 5 channels, comment and private DM replies, story automation, medium analytics dashboard.
welcome.pricing.business_features: 15 channels, full advanced replies, high execution priority, advanced reports, premium support.
welcome.pricing.agency_features: 50 channels, all features unlocked, top execution priority, custom reports, 24/7 dedicated support.
welcome.pricing.manual_info: Note: Due to local payment gateways, subscriptions are activated manually by submitting a request in the dashboard and uploading a payment receipt (Bank transfer, STC Pay, Al-Haram, Al-Kuraimi).
welcome.faq_subtitle: Quick answers to questions you might have about Bariq's automation service.
welcome.faq.q1: Is connecting my accounts to Bariq safe and compliant with Meta policies?
welcome.faq.a1: Yes, Bariq uses the official and approved Meta Graph API through Facebook Login for Business. We never request your passwords, and your accounts remain 100% secure.
welcome.faq.q2: How is the subscription activated after transferring the payment?
welcome.faq.a2: After requesting a subscription in the dashboard, upload a photo of the receipt or write the transaction number. Our admin team reviews and activates your plan in less than an hour.
welcome.faq.q3: Can I cancel my subscription or upgrade to a higher plan later?
welcome.faq.a3: Absolutely. You can upgrade to a larger plan at any time to add more channels, or change your subscription terms when the current cycle ends.
welcome.faq.q4: Can the bot distinguish between different dialects and keywords?
welcome.faq.a4: Yes, Bariq provides a keyword matching engine that supports exact match, text containment, or advanced regular expressions (Regex) to handle various client queries intelligently.
welcome.faq.q5: Does the app support replying to comments in Facebook Groups?
welcome.faq.a5: No, the system is designed specifically for Facebook public Pages and Instagram Business Accounts to ensure the highest performance and official compliance.
welcome.cta_title: Ready to take your customer engagement to the next level?
welcome.cta_subtitle: Join hundreds of businesses that double their sales with Bariq's smart automation.
